svg.text: Guests scan, order, and pay from their phone — no app needed
Guest orders → Server confirms → KDS fires
Real-time preview of customer ordering flow
Guest scans QR → loads synalux.ai/qr/{location_id}/{table_id} (no app install) → selects items → order inserted in pos_orders with source='qr_table'
→ server notified via KDS badge + tablet alert → guest pays via Stripe or adds to table bill → pos_payments linked to pos_orders
Revenue tracked per-table in pos_revenue_centers · All QR sessions expire after 45 min · Real-time order updates via WebSocket
